Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.table

Interface AbstractDBTable<T extends DatabaseEntry>

All Superinterfaces:
SQLQueryable<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
DatabaseTable, DBTableProxy, DeferredDatabaseTable
public interface AbstractDBTable<T extends DatabaseEntry> extends SQLQueryable<T>

    Returns a list of all the possible entries matching with the unique values of the input.
    T

    Loads the first unique result, or throws an exception if none is found.
    Optional<T>

    Loads the first unique result, returns null if none is found and throws an exception if too many are available.
    T

    Loads the first unique result, returns a the newly inserted instance if none is found and throws an exception if too many are available.
